findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "secret_scan" references sensitive artifacts (private key, credentials, secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Scan text content for hardcoded secrets, API keys, and credentials using 20 pre-compiled patterns. Privacy guarantee: Input text is NEVER logged, cached, stored…
